parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'Extract structured data from this CV/resume text. Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown, no explanation:
{
  "name": "",
  "email": "",
  "phone": "",
  "location": "",
  "years_experience": 0,
  "current_title": "",
  "skills": [],
  "education": [{"degree": "", "institution": "", "year": ""}],
  "languages": [],
  "visa_status": "",
  "summary": "<2 sentence professional summary>"
}' }, { role: 'user', content: $json.cvText || 'No CV text provided. Candidate: ' + $json.candidateName + ', applying for: ' + $json.position } ], max_tokens: 600, temperature: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nvidia/nemotron-3-super-120b-a12b:free', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are an HR screening engine for Saffron Kitchen, a restaurant in Dubai. Score this candidate against the job criteria. Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown, no explanation.

{
  "score": <0-100>,
  "tier": "advance|hold|decline",
  "breakdown": {
    "relevant_experience": <0-30>,
    "required_skills_match": <0-25>,
    "education_relevance": <0-15>,
    "location_visa_suitability": <0-15>,
    "language_skills": <0-15>
  },
  "strengths": ["<strength 1>", "<strength 2>"],
  "gaps": ["<gap 1>"],
  "recommendation": "<1-2 sentences>",
  "interview_questions": ["<question about gap 1>", "<question about experience>"]
}

Triage thresholds:
- Score >= 75: advance (send interview invitation)
- Score 50-74: hold (flag for manual review)
- Score < 50: decline (send respectful rejection)

Bias prevention: Evaluate ONLY on job-relevant criteria. Do not score based on name, nationality, gender, or age.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Position: ' + $json.position + '

Candidate parsed CV data:
' + JSON.stringify($json.parsedCV) } ], max_tokens: 500, temperature: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'Write a professional interview invitation email for Saffron Kitchen (restaurant in Dubai).

Include:
- Warm congratulations on advancing to the interview stage
- Position title
- Request to reply with their availability for a 30-minute interview
- What to prepare (brief overview of the role, any documents to bring)
- Contact info: hr@saffronkitchen.ae

Keep it concise (100-150 words). Tone: warm, professional, welcoming.
If the candidate name suggests Arabic speaker, include a brief Arabic greeting at the top.

Return format:
Subject: <subject line>

<email body>' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Candidate: ' + $json.candidateName + '
Position: ' + $json.position + '
Email: ' + $json.email + '
Strengths: ' + JSON.stringify($json.strengths) } ], max_tokens: 400, temperature: 0.5 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'nvidia/nemotron-3-nano-30b-a3b:free', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'Write a respectful, warm rejection email for Saffron Kitchen.

Rules:
- Thank them sincerely for their time and interest
- Do NOT mention scoring, ranking, or comparison with other candidates
- Encourage them to apply for future openings
- Wish them well in their career
- Keep it to 80-100 words
- Tone: warm, respectful, genuine
- If candidate name suggests Arabic speaker, include a brief Arabic closing

Return format:
Subject: <subject line>

<email body>' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Candidate: ' + $json.candidateName + '
Position: ' + $json.position } ], max_tokens: 250, temperature: 0.5 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ client_id: '3bd50557-6680-43b9-bb8e-261c7f8a19d2', event_type: 'cv_screened', summary: ($json.candidateName || 'Unknown') + ' for ' + ($json.position || 'N/A') + ' — ' + ($json.tier || 'unknown') + ' (' + ($json.score || 0) + '/100)', payload: { candidateName: $json.candidateName, email: $json.email, position: $json.position, score: $json.score, tier: $json.tier, breakdown: $json.breakdown, strengths: $json.strengths, gaps: $json.gaps, recommendation: $json.recommendation, interviewQuestions: $json.interviewQuestions, emailType: $json.emailType, emailGenerated: $json.emailGenerated, source: $json.source, appliedAt: $json.appliedAt } }) }}
